businessIssue: Hoodie inventory running low — projected stockout in 4 days
aiRecommendation: Reorder 150 units from StitchHub immediately to cover 7-day forecast demand
humanNote: Approved — cash position supports it and risk is too high to wait
expectedImpact: Avoid stockout, maintain $1,566/day in hoodie revenue
lessonLearned: AI helped connect real-time demand data to inventory levels before a human would have caught it

businessIssue: Tote campaign generating 1.0x ROAS — barely breaking even
aiRecommendation: Pause tote campaign and reallocate budget to hoodie campaign
humanNote: Agreed — no reason to continue spending on a campaign that isn't working
expectedImpact: Save approximately $700/week in wasted ad spend
lessonLearned: Not all traffic converts. ROAS below 2.0x on a product with low margin is a clear stop signal

businessIssue: Sizing complaints increasing — 3 of 14 tickets are wrong-size or fit issues
aiRecommendation: Move size chart higher on product pages and create a saved response template
humanNote: Small fix, high impact — should have been done earlier
expectedImpact: Reduce sizing-related refunds and improve conversion rate
lessonLearned: Customer service data often reveals product page problems that analytics alone miss

businessIssue: Bulk order inquiry from Campus AI Club — 75 shirts, time-sensitive
aiRecommendation: Respond within 24 hours with quote to secure the sale
humanNote: Fast response matters for bulk orders. Quote sent same day
lessonLearned: AI flagged this as high-urgency — without that signal it might have been delayed

businessIssue: Hoodie ad outperforming all other campaigns at 3.8x ROAS
aiRecommendation: Increase hoodie campaign budget by 20% for a 48-hour test
humanNote: Scaling a winner is lower risk than finding a new campaign. 48-hour window gives data without overcommitting
expectedImpact: Estimated 15–20% increase in hoodie revenue over test period
lessonLearned: Scale winners carefully — budget increase is time-limited to evaluate before making permanent
